ConnectedApp.description: OAuth 2.0 Connected App for the CEQ NEPA Export API (MFR #2). Grants external systems access to the NEPA/CEQExport Integration Procedure via the REST API. Fulfills CEQ Permitting Technology Action Plan MFR #2 (Application Data Sharing) at Emerging maturity. Scope: api. IP relaxation required for federal data center ranges.
ConnectedApp.label: NEPA CEQExport API
